task_completion.description: Open and read the operations brief to get the required parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of /home/ga/Documents/QGC/landing_ops_brief.txt.

task_completion.description: Create a mission starting with a Takeoff and a survey waypoint at 50m altitude.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl Plan View showing a 'Takeoff' item and a subsequent 'Waypoint' item in the mission list with an altitude set to 50m.

task_completion.description: Insert a DO_LAND_START command into the mission.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl Plan View mission list showing a 'DO_LAND_START' (MAV_CMD 189) command item.

task_completion.description: Add at least two waypoints with decreasing altitudes following the DO_LAND_START command.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl Plan View mission list showing at least two 'Waypoint' items after the DO_LAND_START command, where the altitude value of the second waypoint is lower than the first.

task_completion.description: Add a final LAND command at the end of the mission.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl Plan View mission list showing a 'Land' (MAV_CMD 21) command as the final item in the sequence.

task_completion.description: Save the mission plan to the specified file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl 'File Save' dialog or a sync/save notification indicating the mission is being saved as 'approach_landing.plan' in /home/ga/Documents/QGC/.

task_completion.description: Configure the required landing parameters in QGroundControl.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl Vehicle Setup -> Parameters screen showing LAND_SPEED set to 50, LAND_ALT_LOW set to 1000, and WPNAV_SPEED_DN set to 100.

integrity.description: The agent used the QGroundControl GUI to plan the mission rather than writing a JSON .plan file manually.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with the QGroundControl map and mission item list on the left panel.

integrity.description: The agent used the QGroundControl GUI to set parameters rather than using terminal scripts or editing parameter files directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent navigating the QGroundControl Parameters menu and modifying values in the UI.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's save functionality to create the plan file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The QGroundControl 'Save Mission' dialog is visible, navigating to the correct directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The operations brief is located at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/landing_ops_brief.txt. The mission plan must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/approach_landing.plan. The required ArduPilot parameters to be set in QGroundControl are: LAND_SPEED = 50, LAND_ALT_LOW = 1000, and WPNAV_SPEED_DN = 100.
